parameters.query:
WITH o AS (
  SELECT * FROM validacao_receita.orders
  WHERE ($1::text IS NOT NULL AND hubspot_deal_id = $1)
     OR ($2::int IS NOT NULL AND id = $2)
  LIMIT 1
),
prods AS (
  SELECT p.*, json_agg(json_build_object(
    'patient', json_build_object(
      'cpf', pt.cpf,
      'nome', pt.nome,
      'telefone', pt.telefone,
      'data_nascimento', pt.data_nascimento,
      'cep', pt.cep,
      'endereco', pt.endereco,
      'numero', pt.numero,
      'complemento', pt.complemento,
      'bairro', pt.bairro,
      'municipio', pt.municipio,
      'uf', pt.uf,
      'quantidade', pt.quantidade,
      'medico_nome', pt.medico_nome,
      'medico_crm', pt.medico_crm,
      'medico_uf', pt.medico_uf,
      'posologia', pt.posologia,
      'data_prescricao', pt.data_prescricao
    ),
    'validation_status', v.status
  ) ORDER BY pt.id) AS patients
  FROM validacao_receita.products p
  LEFT JOIN validacao_receita.patients pt ON pt.product_id = p.id
  LEFT JOIN validacao_receita.validations v ON v.patient_id = pt.id
  WHERE p.order_id = (SELECT id FROM o)
  GROUP BY p.id
)
SELECT
  (SELECT row_to_json(o.*) FROM o) AS order_data,
  (SELECT row_to_json(dc.*) FROM validacao_receita.deal_companies dc WHERE dc.order_id = (SELECT id FROM o) LIMIT 1) AS company,
  (SELECT row_to_json(ct.*) FROM validacao_receita.deal_contacts ct WHERE ct.order_id = (SELECT id FROM o) LIMIT 1) AS contact,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(p.*) ORDER BY p.id) FROM prods p) AS products,
  (SELECT row_to_json(t.*)
     FROM checkout_simples.transactions t
     JOIN checkout_simples.checkouts ch ON ch.id = t.checkout_id
     WHERE ch.external_ref = (SELECT hubspot_deal_id FROM o)
       AND t.status = 'PAID' AND t.paid_at IS NOT NULL
     ORDER BY t.paid_at DESC LIMIT 1
  ) AS payment,
  (SELECT row_to_json(pay.*)
     FROM checkout_simples.payers pay
     JOIN checkout_simples.transactions t ON pay.transaction_id = t.id
     JOIN checkout_simples.checkouts ch ON ch.id = t.checkout_id
     WHERE ch.external_ref = (SELECT hubspot_deal_id FROM o)
       AND t.status = 'PAID'
     ORDER BY t.paid_at DESC LIMIT 1
  ) AS payer
UPDATE validacao_receita.orders SET pedido_fc_emitido_at = NOW() WHERE hubspot_deal_id = $1 AND pedido_fc_emitido_at IS NULL RETURNING id, pedido_fc_emitido_at

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, erpnext: $('POST issue_order ERPNext').first().json.message, marked: $('Mark order sent').first().json }) }}
